use_cases: Displaying temperature data across multiple cities over time periods
Comparing categorical breakdowns within time-series data
Visualizing proportional distribution of values across categories
Creating interactive data dashboards with tooltip details
Showing trends and patterns in temporal datasets
ai_summary: A stacked bar chart component built with visx that visualizes temperature data across multiple cities over a 12-month period. Features interactive tooltips revealing detailed values, clean axis labels with date formatting, grid lines for readability, and a color-coded ordinal legend for series identification. Designed for analytics dashboards and data reporting in SaaS applications.
